meta.default_description: Santorini transfers and private island tours. Airport, port and hotel pickups, custom routes, fixed prices, and 24/7 service.
meta.home_description: Private Santorini transfers and tours with a Mercedes-Benz fleet. Airport, port and hotel pickup, fixed prices, licensed local drivers, wine tours and sightseeing — available 24/7.

hero.headline: Santorini Transfers & Tours
hero.sub: Santorini transfers and private island tours. Airport, port, hotel and custom routes across the caldera. Fixed prices, meet-and-greet arrivals, and 24/7 service.

services.heading: Transfers Tours & Premium Service
services.sub: Everything you need to move around Santorini, from airport pickup to a full-day private tour.

items.title: Transfers
items.body: Reliable Mercedes transfers across Santorini. Meet-and-greet, flight tracking, fixed prices.

items.title: Tours
items.body: Wine routes, sightseeing, full-day island journeys, shaped around your pace and light.

items.title: Premium
items.body: Upgraded vehicles, dedicated chauffeur, and fully tailored itineraries for special occasions.

about_teaser.heading: Built on the island. Run by locals.
about_teaser.body: Santorini Imperial is a team of licensed operators who love the island enough to show up at 3am so you never worry about your ride.

why.heading: Fixed Prices. Mercedes Fleet. Every Day of the Year.

items.title: Fixed Prices
items.body: The price you're quoted is the price you pay. No surge pricing, no luggage surcharges.

items.title: 24/7 Service
items.body: Late-night ferry, 5am flight, 2pm nap-time pickup — we dispatch whenever you need us.

items.title: Licensed Drivers
items.body: Every driver is professionally licensed, insured, and speaks fluent English.

items.title: Card Payments
items.body: All major cards accepted. No processing fees. Invoice on request.

tours.heading: Tours
tours.sub: Pair any of these with a transfer and we handle the day end-to-end.

fleet.heading: Our Mercedes-Benz Lineup
fleet.sub: Every vehicle climate-controlled, newly maintained, and fitted for comfort on Santorini's narrow roads.

testimonials_list.name: Adriana R.

testimonials_list.quote: The wine tour was paced beautifully — enough time at each winery to actually taste, never rushed.
testimonials_list.name: Daniel M.

testimonials_list.quote: Booking was simple, the V-Class was immaculate, and the price we were quoted was the price we paid. Exactly what you want.
testimonials_list.name: Sofia K.

items.q: Do you track flights for delays?
items.a: Yes, always. We monitor your flight in real time and adjust pickup time accordingly. There is no extra charge for reasonable delays.
Our fleet is entirely Mercedes-Benz: E-Class (up to 3 passengers), V-Class (up to 7), Sprinter 12-seat, and Sprinter 20-seat. All climate-controlled and fully insured.
Use the online booking form, send us an email, or message us on WhatsApp. We confirm within the hour during daytime and within four hours overnight.

items.q: Can I combine a tour and a transfer on the same day?
items.a: Absolutely. Many guests fly in, do a sightseeing or wine tour, and transfer to their hotel in a single booking. Just tell us your plan and we handle the rest.

items.q: Do you operate 24 hours a day?
items.a: Yes, 24/7, every day of the year including public holidays. Early-morning flight or late-night ferry — we are there.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: All major credit and debit cards, bank transfer, and cash. The price you are quoted is the price you pay — no surprises at the door.

items.q: Can I cancel or change my booking?
items.a: Yes. We ask for at least 24 hours notice for a full refund. For changes, contact us as early as possible and we will do our best to accommodate.

hero.headline: Santorini Premium Transfer Services
hero.sub: Airport, port, hotel, and private chauffeur. Mercedes-Benz fleet, licensed local drivers, fixed prices, 24/7.

services.title: Airport Transfers
services.body: Meet-and-greet at JTR arrivals, luggage assistance, direct to your accommodation. Flight-tracked — no charge for reasonable delays.

services.title: Port Transfers
services.body: Coordinated with cruise arrivals at Athinios. Driver waits portside with a sign. Luggage and buggy room included.

services.title: Hotel-to-Hotel
services.body: Changing properties mid-stay? We move you and your bags door-to-door, same-day or scheduled.

services.title: Wedding Transfers
services.body: Full fleet available for wedding parties — coordinated timing, ribbons optional, group bookings discounted.

services.title: Beach & Evening
services.body: Daytime beach runs, evening club transfers, late-night returns. Safe, sober, on-time.

services.title: 24-Hour Driver
services.body: Your dedicated driver and Mercedes for the day. Set the itinerary as you go, stop where you want, no meter running.

items.q: How much does a Santorini airport transfer cost?
items.a: Every transfer is fixed-price and quoted up front based on your destination and group size. No meter, no surge pricing, no surprises. Tell us your route and we send the exact price before you book.

items.q: How long does the transfer from Santorini Airport (JTR) take?
items.a: Most airport transfers take 15 to 30 minutes depending on your hotel. Fira is about 15 minutes, Oia around 30. Athinios port is roughly 20 to 25 minutes from the airport.

items.q: Do you offer meet-and-greet on arrival?
items.a: Yes. Your driver waits inside the arrivals area, or portside at Athinios, holding a sign with your name, helps with your luggage, and walks you to the vehicle.

items.q: What happens if my flight or ferry is delayed?
items.a: We track your flight or ferry in real time and adjust the pickup automatically. There is no extra charge for reasonable delays, so you never need to worry about waiting times.

items.q: Can you provide child and baby seats?
items.a: Yes, free of charge. Just tell us the ages of the children when you book and we fit the appropriate child or booster seats.

items.q: How do I pay for my Santorini transfer?
items.a: All major credit and debit cards, bank transfer, or cash. The price you are quoted is the price you pay, with no processing fees.

hero.sub: Newly maintained, fully insured, climate-controlled. Chosen for comfort on narrow island roads.

hero.headline: Built on the Island. Run by Locals.
hero.sub: Santorini Imperial is a small team of licensed operators who happen to love the island enough to show up at 3am so you don't have to worry about your ride.

pillars.title: Local
pillars.body: We live here. Every driver, every guide, every booking confirmation. You are never routed through a foreign call centre.

pillars.title: Mercedes only
pillars.body: A single, maintained fleet — because consistency is what separates a ride from a transfer.

pillars.title: Fixed-price, always
pillars.body: The quote is the price. No surge hours, no surprise luggage fees, no change at the door.

story.heading: About us
paragraphs: Santorini Imperial was born from a simple belief: that arriving in Santorini should feel as effortless as the island is beautiful. We are a local, family-run team of licensed drivers and guides with more than 12 years of experience in premium Santorini transfers and private tours across the caldera.

From the moment you land, we take care of every detail. Our Santorini airport and port transfers run on fixed prices, meet-and-greet arrivals, and a modern Mercedes-Benz fleet, so whether you are heading to Oia, Fira, or a cliffside villa, your ride is comfortable, punctual, and stress-free, 24/7.

Beyond transfers, we design private Santorini tours built entirely around you: sunset drives, winery visits, volcanic viewpoints, and the hidden corners most visitors never see. We also handle wedding transfers and bespoke routes with the same care, discretion, and attention to detail.

Because Santorini is our home, we know every village, vineyard, and viewpoint by heart. Travel with us and discover the island the way locals do, with reliability, genuine hospitality, and luxury service worthy of your holiday. Welcome to Santorini Imperial.

hero.headline: Tell Us Your Plan.
hero.sub: Fill the form or reach us directly — we reply within the hour during daylight and within four hours overnight.
